name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Marietta, GA's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 1802 Roswell Rd #3 provides same-day car title loans with minimal requirements and quick cash.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans is located at 1802 Roswell Rd #3 in Marietta, GA, operating as a standalone storefront in an accessible commercial area. The location is open weekdays from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturdays from 9 AM to 5 PM, closed Sundays. Marietta residents can visit during these hours for a straightforward loan application process.

This Marietta location specializes in car title loans, allowing you to borrow against your vehicle's title with minimal documentation and no hidden fees. The team can typically process applications the same day and provide cash loans up to several thousand dollars based on your vehicle's value. For specific questions about rates, eligibility, or loan terms, call +1 754-247-1902—staff at this GA location will explain all options clearly.

If you're in Marietta and need quick cash, bring a valid government ID, proof of residency, your vehicle's title, and proof of insurance. Montana Capital prioritizes getting you money fast without the lengthy approval timelines of traditional banks. Visit during business hours to discuss your specific borrowing needs and get approved the same day.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding (one customer reported cash within 1 hour)
No credit check or credit score impact required
Loan amounts up to $50,000, larger than typical payday loans
Keep your car keys and continue driving during repayment
Fast online pre-approval in under 5 minutes
24/7 access to apply for loans online
Accepts applicants with bankruptcies and bad credit history
Multiple disbursement options (direct deposit or check pickup)
cons: Title loans typically carry 100-300% APR; no rates disclosed on website, preventing rate comparison
Repossession risk if borrower defaults—vehicle can be seized despite continued payment efforts
Collateral-based lending creates cycle risk for financially vulnerable borrowers who cannot repay
One customer noted funds arrive as bank check, not cash, despite marketing language suggesting cash
No mention of flexible payment plans despite claims of 'payment plans that suit your needs'
best_for: Borrowers with urgent cash needs ($500-$2,000) who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Vehicle owners with substantial equity in paid-off or low-lien cars who have exhausted other options
Consumers facing immediate emergencies (medical bills, evictions, utilities) with no credit history or poor credit
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans or payday alternatives. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt (typically 100%+ APR) with repossession risk; borrowers should only pursue this option after exhausting payday alternatives, credit union PALs, or personal loans, as default can result in loss of transportation.
services: In-person title loan application at physical locations
Vehicle title return upon loan payoff
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 1802 Roswell Rd, Marietta, GA. Same-day car title loans with quick cash and flexible terms.
